title: Pictostudio - WRR
description: A datapack that adds more balanced wood recipes to the game. At least in my opinion.
body:
![WRR](https://res.cloudinary.com/db9og4cir/image/upload/v1730258481/woodenrecipesrevamped_ahlxan.png) # Brief A datapack that rebalances wooden recipes within a vanilla friendly way, no more in getting just the one pressure plate from two planks. Instead receieve 4, as you can get 2 slabs from 1 plank this seems fair.

## Datapack Information - Rebalances vanilla wooden recipes, to give you more output in a balanced way. - Added a log to chest recipe, 8 logs to 4 chests! - Added a log to stick recipe, 2 logs to 16 sticks! ## Links ### WoodenRecipesRevamped ### WRR Links ### My Other Projects [![ko-fi](https://ko-fi.com/img/githubbutton_sm.svg)](https://ko-fi.com/B0B511WBXS) --- ## License [Datapacks](https://github.com/Pictostudio/datapacks) © 2024 by [Jordan Picton](https://github.com/JordanPicton) is licensed under [CC BY-SA 4.0](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-sa/4.0/?ref=chooser-v1)
